svg.title: Stage 7 challenge before-after contact sheet
svg.desc: Ten time samples comparing the previous heuristic Stage 7 challenge layout to the current reference-path promoted layout.
svg.text: Stage 7 / Challenging Stage 2 before-after visual evidence
Before = heuristic path-family layout. After = current reference-path promoted runtime.
Read: the promoted path keeps a five-track reference identity attached to every challenge enemy; this is visible evidence, not a score gate by itself.
